## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My content uses UK English spelling
- [ ] Code examples are tested and working
- [ ] If a prompt: I have tested it in at least one AI tool
- [ ] I have updated [PROMPTS.md](../PROMPTS.md) if I added a new prompt
- [ ] No marketing language, no unverified claims
